# CWE-280 — Improper Handling of Insufficient Permissions or Privileges (safe) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-280-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"errors"
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"
	"sync"
	"syscall"
)

var tenantStore sync.Map

// Safe: aborts when the process lacks permission to access the resource.
func DeleteTenant(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	raw := r.URL.Query().Get("id")
	path := "/secure/tenants/" + filepath.Base(raw)
	f, err := os.Open(path)
	if err != nil {
		if errors.Is(err, syscall.EACCES) || errors.Is(err, syscall.EPERM) {
			http.Error(w, "forbidden", http.StatusForbidden)
			return
		}
		http.Error(w, "open failed", http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	f.Close()
	tenantStore.Delete(r.URL.Query().Get("id"))
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
